name: Hippo Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company In August 2021, Hippo Enterprises Inc., a Delaware corporation (Old Hippo) completed a business combination resulting in Old Hippo becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of, Reinvent Technology Partners Z, a Cayman Islands exempted company and special purpose acquisition company which at that time changed its name to Hippo Holdings Inc.
